subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured of the verses of God! Upon thee be the Glory of God! Several replies have already been written, therefore this one shall be brief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله علیک بهاء الله چند جواب مرقوم شد لهذا حال اختصار میشود
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @exhortations and counsels
